title: Add Diner Hell and Toxic Trails Science haunted houses + Kitchen Nightmares scene + generated logos

requirements.text: Add a new haunted house entry named "Diner Hell" to the haunted house catalog with an English scary tagline and an English scary description. The haunted house must include a sub-scene named "Kitchen Nightmares" inside the Diner Hell haunted house (stored in the haunted house data as a sub-scene entry).

quotes: Add a new haunted house called Diner Hell add logo for it and add scary description for it, and a new haunted house called Toxic Trails science, and scene called Kitchen Nightmares inside Diner hell haunted house
1. Yes logo and description. And diner hell logo rusted and bloody and broken lights.

acceptanceCriteria: "Diner Hell" appears in the haunted houses list rendered by the existing HauntedHousesSection.
The Diner Hell entry includes a non-empty tagline and description in English.
The Diner Hell entry includes a sub-scene list containing an entry titled "Kitchen Nightmares".

requirements.text: Add a new haunted house entry named "Toxic Trails Science" to the haunted house catalog with an English scary tagline and an English scary description.

quotes: Add a new haunted house called Diner Hell add logo for it and add scary description for it, and a new haunted house called Toxic Trails science, and scene called Kitchen Nightmares inside Diner hell haunted house
Toxic trials logo should like Green but bloody. Only rusted logo for diner hell

acceptanceCriteria: "Toxic Trails Science" appears in the haunted houses list rendered by the existing HauntedHousesSection.
The Toxic Trails Science entry includes a non-empty tagline and description in English.

requirements.text: Add generated image asset mappings for the new haunted houses so they render with images in the haunted house grid. Update the generated images mapping to include keys for "Diner Hell" and "Toxic Trails Science" that point to the newly generated static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Add a new haunted house called Diner Hell add logo for it and add scary description for it, and a new haunted house called Toxic Trails science
Toxic trials logo should like Green but bloody. Only rusted logo for diner hell

acceptanceCriteria: generatedImages.hauntedHouses contains entries for "Diner Hell" and "Toxic Trails Science".
The haunted houses grid displays images (non-broken sources) for both new haunted houses.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing UI components only).
Do not edit immutable frontend hook/bootstrap files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Do not add new backend/Motoko data models or persistence for haunted houses (keep these additions in the existing frontend content catalogs).
Do not add new CMS capabilities or admin editing flows for haunted house entries or sub-scenes.

required: Haunted house logo image of a rusted, bloody diner sign with broken/flickering lights (house-diner-hell-logo.dim_1400x900.jpg)
Haunted house logo image in a vivid toxic green palette with blood splatter and a corrupted science/hazard vibe (house-toxic-trails-science-logo.dim_1400x900.jpg)
